title: Someone is Knocking: Horror
description: This is a horror build with The Knocker and Deimos mods, and it includes a resource pack for the Alpha version.
body:
- 👁 Someone is Knocking: Horror A Minecraft modpack that adds a bunch of horror mods that will make your game a thrilling experience. If you want to be spooked, then this is the modpack for you.

 

- 🩸 THE CONTENT
The world is no longer yours. Terrifying entities are now stalking your every move, completely giving Minecraft a pitch-black horror paint-over.

The Knocker & Door_Knocker: You are never safe, even behind closed doors. This ancient evil will stalk your shelter and test your sanity by violently knocking on your doors.

Deimos: A relentless and terrifying predator that stalks you from the dark, waiting for the perfect moment to strike.

The Forgotten: A mysterious, forgotten entity that haunts your steps and breaks your psychological boundaries.

Server-Side Horror: Adds deeply unsettling events and encounters to enhance the multiplayer experience.

Horror Structures: Exploration is now highly dangerous. Discover abandoned, eerie, and cursed structures scattered across your world that hide dark secrets.

 

- ⚙️ FEATURES & SURVIVAL TOOLS 
Immersive Audio: Powered by Sounds of the Forest and Simple Voice Chat. Every whisper, wind rustle, and crackling branch will make you turn around. Proximity voice chat makes surviving with friends ten times scarier.

Nostalgic Terror: Features Nostalgic Tweaks and The Original Work: Alpha Edition. This brings back the classic, lonely, and deeply unsettling atmosphere of early Minecraft Alpha

versions.Insanity & Complementary Shaders: Total visual overhaul using Oculus. Dense fog, realistic lighting, and a deeply disturbing atmosphere that changes how you see the world.

Performance Enhancements: Smooth frame rates and heavy optimization powered by Embeddium, EMF, and ETF so your game runs flawlessly even during jumpscares.

e4mc Integration: Easily open your horror world to your friends and share the terror together without setting up a complicated server.

 

- ⚠️ WARNING
This modpack contains intense jumpscares, flashing visuals, and loud audio effects. Play at your own risk.

Are you brave enough to open the door when they knock?
